response.original_title: THE SONS OF BROWNSY BY CHIEF TUTU BAFFOUR BROWNSY WILLIAMS
response.overview: ## THE OVERVIEW  **"The Sons of Brownsy"** is a gripping family drama tracking an eighteen-year migration from Kumasi to Accra. When pride and sudden debt shatter the life of maintenance engineer Tutu Baffour Brownsy Williams, he flees to the capital with his three young sons. Living in a cramped space behind a provisions shop, Tutu wages a relentless war against poverty. As the boys grow, the family fractures under the weight of class shame and ambition. While two sons climb into high-society legal and medical careers, the ultimate price of their success is paid through the silent sacrifice of their father and youngest brother. It is a powerful cinematic story of economic resilience, the heavy cost of ambition, and final family reconciliation.
response.tagline: Option 1: One father’s silent sacrifice. Three sons’ rise to power.
response.title: THE SONS OF BROWNSY BY CHIEF TUTU BAFFOUR BROWNSY WILLIAMS
